Hey, this is Russell Brunson and we're welcoming you to the Attractive Character Training Program.
Now, the Attractive Character, there's kind of two different things we talk about in here.
One, we're focusing on how to build up your own personal attractive character and really the voice and the way you communicate with your audience.
So that's kind of the first half of this.
And the second half of this training program is kind of digging deeper into the actual practicality of how do you send out emails and what are we saying in each of the emails.
And so as you see down below, you're going to see a bunch of things.
The first section here is the Attractive Character.
And you're going to see some presentations from me, some presentations from one of my friends named John Alliness, and a couple of other people that I've learned some really good stuff about this whole concept of attractive character.
There's a lot of videos about that topic, but I want you to do it to watch them and internalize them because when you start understanding how this works and why it works and you start applying it into your business, you're going to see some huge tremendous effects.
So that's kind of the first step.
Second thing we're talking about is what we call our soap opera sequences.
And this is the initial email sequence we send out to people after they join our list that's going to help introduce them to the attractive character.
And this is key during this first anywhere from five to ten days of your email sequence is where people decide they're going to keep opening your emails, they're going to listen to you, if they're going to buy from you.
And so we do that, we try to build that bond and that relationship with the attractive character and the subscriber through the soap opera sequence.
And after that bond has been created, then we move them to another type of list.
And from this point forward, we keep them in what we call our daily Seinfeld emails.
And so there's been a whole training section down below about our daily Seinfeld emails as well.
So that's kind of the game plan of what's happening here in this membership site.
Again, it's three phases, the attractive character, our daily soap opera sequence and our daily Seinfeld emails.
And down in the section, you'll see trainings, you'll see the scripts, you'll see a whole bunch of really cool stuff to help you to implement and apply everything we're talking about here.
So again, thank you so much for joining this training program.
I think you're going to love it and all the information is here.
Dive right in and have some fun.
